title: Graph QL query to fetch the value of progress tracking column

posts.author: Shreyas13398 (Shreyas)
posts.cookedHtml:
query{
boards(ids:123) {
name

          items(newest_first:true,limit:500) {
            id
            name
            parent_item {
              id
              name
            }
            column_values {
              title
              text
              value
            }
          }
        }
      }

Above is my query which fetches the value of progress tracking column but when I tried on monday.com API playground I could not able to fetch the value/status of that column
It is giving me null. How can I fetch it?

          {
            "title": "Progress",
            "text": "",
            "value": null
          }

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Shreyas13398

Unfortunatly you can’t fetch that column as stated here:

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @basdebruin for the reply!
